title: Disable Auto Minimize
body:
I quickly made this mod because I was annoyed by minecraft's fullscreen, but shortly after I made it I realized you can't move any other windows in front of the game window, so now this mod has been replaced with a more polished and customizable one: [Borderless Fullscreen](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-fullscreen)



Original description
<details> 
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

With this mod, Minecraft will no longer automatically minimize when tabbing out of the game.

The game will still enter exclusive fullscreen mode, which means minimal input lag.

</details>
